headline: Dell (DELL) Faces $70 Million XTX Lawsuit Over Server Pricing
summary: XTX Markets’ Finnish unit has filed a lawsuit against Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) over alleged server price increases tied to data center contracts. The dispute involves around US$70 million and centers on pricing for infrastructure that supports high performance trading operations. This legal action is separate from Dell’s recent activity around AI infrastructure and focuses on how large enterprise clients are charged for hardware. Dell Technologies sits at the heart of global enterprise...
